name: Pharmaserv Logistics
description: Pharmaserv Logistics has established a new pharma distribution center focused on packing pharmaceutical airfreight and regional GMP production logistics, particularly benefiting international biologics manufacturers. With years of experience in temperature-sensitive biologics and a strong emphasis on export, they position themselves as experts in pharmaceutical logistics.

name: World Courier
description: The company specializes in pharmaceutical logistics, focusing on the secure and compliant delivery of biopharmaceutical products worldwide. With expertise in temperature-controlled solutions and adherence to stringent regulations, they ensure the efficient transportation of vital medications, vaccines, and research samples, making them a key player in global biopharma logistics.

name: NextPharma Logistics GmbH
description: NextPharma Logistics is a leading pharmaceutical logistics provider in the D-A-CH region, offering certified quality and tailored services for temperature-sensitive and time-critical shipments. They ensure secure storage and efficient distribution of pharmaceutical products, with a focus on compliance and experienced customer service.

name: Pharmalog
description: PharmaLog 2023 is a key event that brings together leaders in pharmaceutical logistics, focusing on supply chain efficiency, sustainability, and security. The company highlights the opportunity for sponsors to engage with key stakeholders in the industry.

name: Logistics4Pharma (L4P)
description: Logistics4Pharma is a specialized provider of pharmaceutical logistics, focusing on temperature-controlled shipping and compliance with Good Distribution Practice (GDP). Their experienced team designs customized transport solutions tailored to the specific needs of the pharmaceuticals industry.

name: RV Ímola
description: The company specializes in providing integrated and customizable logistics solutions tailored for the pharmaceutical sector, offering comprehensive services such as transportation, storage, and delivery of medical supplies and medications. Their emphasis on technology and dedicated teams ensures effective management of logistical challenges, including the delivery of medicines to remote locations.

name: Marken
description: Marken is a specialized logistics provider that focuses on clinical and commercial supply chain solutions, including drug storage and distribution. With a robust Quality Management System and a global GMP depot network, Marken ensures efficient and compliant logistics for the pharmaceutical industry.

name: LifeScience Logistics
description: LifeScience Logistics specializes in providing strategic supply chain solutions tailored for the pharmaceutical and medical device sectors. Their commitment to high-quality, compliant storage, monitoring, and distribution directly supports public health and patient safety.

name: NextPharma
description: NextPharma Logistics specializes in pharmaceutical logistics, offering outsourcing and temperature-controlled logistics services. With a robust infrastructure that includes multiple storage and distribution sites across Europe, they support drug development and clinical trial supply needs, ensuring reliable and efficient logistics solutions for the healthcare sector.

name: Movianto
description: Movianto is a specialized service provider in healthcare logistics, offering comprehensive outsourcing services for the pharmaceutical and biotech industries. Their extensive network and tailored logistics processes, including active temperature control and secure warehousing, ensure reliable and high-quality solutions that meet stringent regulations.
